## 📋 Today's Overview
*June 16, 2026*

### Superconductivity (9 new today)

Here are the concise, one-sentence summaries for each paper, following the required structure.

1.  The study focuses on **monolithic hybrid quantum dot devices in twisted bilayer graphene**, employing **gate-tunable superconductivity** to address/solve **the limitations of conventional superconducting-semiconducting systems by providing a reconfigurable and scalable architecture with single-electron control**.
2.  The study focuses on **YBa₂Cu₃O₇₋δ thin films**, employing **30 keV He⁺ irradiation** to address/solve **the competing requirements of reliable superconductivity suppression and minimal structural degradation for nanoscale patterning**.
3.  The study focuses on **a strongly correlated triangular Hubbard band in twisted trilayer WSe₂**, employing **alternating twisted trilayer TMD systems** to address/solve **the realization of the triangular-lattice Hubbard model in the moderate-correlation regime near quarter and half filling**.
4.  The study focuses on **bilayer graphene**, employing **on-chip superconducting GHz RF reflectometry** to address/solve **the need to resolve both resistive and capacitive responses in a dual-gated device where a displacement field opens a band gap**.
5.  The study focuses on **a single microwave photon detector**, employing **photo-assisted quasiparticle tunneling to a superconducting island** to address/solve **the challenge of achieving fast, continuous detection with high time resolution and short dead time**.
6.  The study focuses on **wafer-level Tantalum-Tantalum thermocompression bonding**, employing **an ultrathin Au passivation layer** to address/solve **the issue of rapid native oxide formation that limits low-temperature, low-pressure bonding for 3D integration of superconducting interconnects**.
7.  The study focuses on **superconducting nanodevices with multiple weak links**, employing **a detailed analysis of the critical current function** to address/solve **the question of whether the IB symmetry (reversal of both bias current and magnetic field) is maintained**.
8.  The study focuses on **a Janus monolayer of transition-metal dichalcogenides**, employing **substitution of one Te chalcogen layer with Se** to address/solve **the question of whether the charge density wave instability persists in 1T ZrTe₂ when the chalcogen layer is modified**.
9.  The study focuses on **tantalum as a base material for superconducting integrated circuits**, employing **a review of its performance in microwave resonators and qubits** to address/solve **the fundamental limitations of material-related losses in quantum applications**.

### spin glass (3 new today)

1. The study focuses on **the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) on NISQ devices**, employing a **landscape-similarity-guided optimization approach within a divide-and-conquer framework** to address/solve **the classical training bottleneck caused by the exponential number of sub-problems arising from boundary node decomposition**.
2. The study focuses on **Mn2In2Se5 van der Waals layers**, employing **molecular beam epitaxy (MBE) via heterointegration of MnSe on In2Se3** to address/solve **the growth of a spin glass material with high magnetic frustration**.
3. The study focuses on **three-dimensional spin glasses**, employing **Parallel Tempering enhanced with Houdayer moves and an entropic reservoir (PTHR)** to address/solve **the challenge of accelerating low-temperature simulations and equilibrating large lattice samples down to very low temperatures**.

### Superconductivity

| 1 | **[Monolithic hybrid quantum dot devices in superconducting twisted bilayer graphene](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14685v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Gate-tunable superconductivity in magic-angle twisted bilayer graphene (MATBG) has enabled the realization of superconducting devices, such as Josephson junctions, within a single crystal. This interface-free platform provides a reconfigurable and scalable architecture that overcomes limitations of conventional superconducting-semiconducting systems. Incorporating single-electron control enables access to regimes in which flat-band superconductivity competes with strong Coulomb repulsion, providing a platform for studying correlated physics phenomena. Here, we report a new class of quantum devices that combines electrostatic confinement with tunable superconductivity in a monolithic MATBG architecture. Within a single device, we demonstrate two complementary hybrid systems: superconducting islands and proximitized quantum dots. The superconducting island exhibits $2e$-periodic transport, indicating a well-defined gap protected against quasiparticle poisoning. The proximitized quantum dot hosts subgap Andreev states together with a strongly parity-modulated supercurrent.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>魔角扭曲双层石墨烯中的栅极可调超导性使得在单晶内实现超导器件（如约瑟夫森结）成为可能。这种无界面的平台提供了一种可重构且可扩展的架构，克服了传统超导-半导体系统的局限性。结合单电子控制，可以进入平带超导性与强库仑排斥相互竞争的区间，为研究关联物理现象提供了平台。在此，我们报告了一类新型量子器件，该器件在单片MATBG架构中结合了静电约束与可调超导性。在单个器件内，我们展示了两种互补的混合系统：超导岛和邻近效应量子点。超导岛表现出$2e$周期输运，表明其具有明确的能隙，可防止准粒子中毒。邻近效应量子点容纳了亚隙安德烈夫态以及强奇偶性调制的超电流。</p></details> | 2026-06-12 | Alexandra Mestre-Torà et al. |
| 2 | **[Tailoring the properties of YBa$_{2}$Cu$_{3}$O$_{7-δ}$ thin films by 30 keV He$^+$ irradiation: An enabling route to superconducting device nanopatterning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14588v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Focused helium ion beam (He-FIB) irradiation with 30 keV ions is a key tool for nanoscale patterning and defect engineering in high transition temperature (Tc) cuprate superconducting devices, yet its usable fluence window is constrained by the competing requirements of reliable superconductivity suppression and minimal structural degradation. In this work, we provide a comprehensive dataset on the effects of large-area 30 keV He+ ion exposure on the electric transport and superconducting properties of epitaxial YBa2Cu3O7 (YBCO) thin films. X-ray diffraction shows a fluence-driven loss of crystalline order accompanied by an out-of-plane lattice expansion and an orthorhombic-to-tetragonal transition, culminating at predominant amorphization at the highest fluence of 1 x 10^16 cm^-2. Raman spectra exhibit increasing disorder while lacking signatures of oxygen depletion, indicating that irradiation mainly generates oxygen-related Frenkel defects rather than changing the carrier concentration. Consistently, with increasing fluence, the normal-state resistivity ρ_N(T) at temperature T above Tc increases strongly, while d ρ_N/d T remains nearly unchanged at moderate fluence. The suppression of Tc is accurately described by Abrikosov-Gor'kov pair breaking and reaches complete quenching of superconductivity at 4.5 x 10^15 cm^-2. The anisotropic upper critical fields decrease approximately exponentially with increasing fluence, the vortex activation energy is reduced, and the anisotropy drops, in contrast to oxygen-depleted YBCO. Hall-angle analysis confirms a nearly constant carrier density but a systematic increase in defect scattering and reduced mobility, consistent with a crossover toward the dirty limit at high fluence. These results establish quantitative fluence thresholds and a practical operational window for He-FIB nanopatterning of YBCO quantum circuits.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>使用30 keV离子的聚焦氦离子束辐照是对高转变温度铜酸盐超导器件进行纳米尺度图案化和缺陷工程的关键工具，然而其可用注量窗口受到可靠抑制超导性与最小化结构退化这两个相互矛盾要求的制约。在本工作中，我们提供了大面积30 keV He+离子暴露对外延YBa2Cu3O7薄膜的电输运和超导特性影响的全面数据集。X射线衍射显示，注量驱动的晶序丧失伴随着面外晶格膨胀和正交相到四方相的转变，并在最高注量1 x 10^16 cm^-2下最终导致主要非晶化。拉曼光谱表现出无序度增加，但缺乏氧耗尽的特征，表明辐照主要产生氧相关的弗仑克尔缺陷，而非改变载流子浓度。一致地，随着注量增加，高于Tc的温度T下的常态电阻率ρ_N(T)显著增加，而在中等注量下d ρ_N/d T几乎保持不变。Tc的抑制可由Abrikosov-Gor'kov对破坏精确描述，并在4.5 x 10^15 cm^-2注量下达到超导性的完全淬灭。与氧耗尽的YBCO不同，各向异性上临界场随注量增加近似指数下降，涡旋激活能降低，各向异性减小。霍尔角分析证实载流子密度几乎恒定，但缺陷散射系统性增加且迁移率降低，这与高注量下向脏极限的交叉一致。这些结果为YBCO量子电路的He-FIB纳米图案化建立了定量注量阈值和实用操作窗口。</p></details> | 2026-06-12 | Bernd Aichner et al. |
| 3 | **[Superconductivity near quarter and half filling of a strongly correlated triangular Hubbard band in twisted trilayer WSe2](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.11495v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The triangular-lattice Hubbard model is one of the paradigmatic settings for studying correlated electronic systems with geometric frustration that can give rise to a variety of phases. Recently, twisted bilayer TMD systems have emerged as attractive experimental platforms for realising such a model in the moderate-correlation regime. Alternating twisted trilayer TMD systems are expected to realise stronger correlations than bilayer systems owing to their mirror symmetry. Here we report the discovery of superconductivity near quarter- and half-filling, together with various correlated phases, in alternating twisted trilayer WSe2 (TTWSe2). At half filling, a robust correlated insulating state persists over a broad range of displacement fields, signalling the strongly correlated regime. Upon doping, superconductivity emerges over an extended region of the phase diagram. Near quarter filling, another superconducting state appears flanked by correlated metals. Our results establish the TTWSe2 system as a compelling platform for studying strongly correlated triangular-lattice Hubbard physics.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>三角晶格哈伯德模型是研究具有几何阻挫的关联电子系统的范式之一，这种阻挫可以产生多种相。近年来，扭曲双层过渡金属硫族化合物系统已成为在中等关联区间实现此类模型的有吸引力的实验平台。由于镜像对称性，交替扭曲三层TMD系统预期比双层系统实现更强的关联。在此，我们报告在交替扭曲三层WSe2中，在四分之一填充和半填充附近发现超导性以及多种关联相。在半填充时，一个强健的关联绝缘态在宽泛的位移场范围内持续存在，标志着强关联区间。掺杂后，超导性在相图的一个扩展区域中出现。在四分之一填充附近，另一个超导态出现，其两侧为关联金属。我们的结果确立了TTWSe2系统作为研究强关联三角晶格哈伯德物理的一个引人注目的平台。</p></details> | 2026-06-12 | Yungi Jeong et al. |
| 4 | **[On-chip superconducting GHz RF reflectometry of the capacitance response in bilayer graphene](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14431v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>In dual-gated bilayer graphene, a perpendicular displacement field opens a band gap that modifies both the channel conductance and the electronic compressibility, motivating measurements that resolve resistive and capacitive responses on the same device. We integrate an hBN-encapsulated bilayer graphene heterostructure with an on-chip superconducting Nb lumped-element LC resonator and carry out RF reflectometry near 4.25 GHz. DC transport and finite-bias spectroscopy on the same device provide a transport reference. Top and bottom gates independently set the carrier density and displacement field. The DC and RF gate maps share the same gate-dependent features, with finite-bias measurements revealing a region of suppressed conductance whose bias extent grows with the displacement field, consistent with a field-induced gap. The gate-dependent resonance-frequency shift is converted to the effective capacitance seen by the resonator using an equivalent-circuit model. The capacitance shows a minimum near the conductance-suppressed region, consistent with reduced electronic compressibility in the gapped bilayer graphene, and exhibits an electron-hole asymmetry. The on-chip configuration probes the gate-dependent admittance of a dual-gated van der Waals heterostructure, providing capacitance-sensitive information that complements DC transport within a single device.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在双栅极双层石墨烯中，垂直位移场打开一个带隙，该带隙同时改变沟道电导和电子压缩率，这激发了在同一器件上解析电阻和电容响应的测量。我们将hBN封装的双层石墨烯异质结与片上超导铌集总元件LC谐振器集成，并在约4.25 GHz进行射频反射测量。同一器件上的直流输运和有限偏压光谱提供了输运参考。顶栅和底栅独立设置载流子密度和位移场。直流和射频栅极图共享相同的栅极依赖特征，有限偏压测量揭示了一个电导被抑制的区域，其偏压范围随位移场增大而增大，与场致带隙一致。使用等效电路模型将栅极依赖的谐振频率偏移转换为谐振器所见的有效电容。该电容在电导被抑制区域附近显示最小值，与有隙双层石墨烯中电子压缩率降低一致，并表现出电子-空穴不对称性。片上配置探测了双栅极范德华异质结的栅极依赖导纳，提供了在单个器件内补充直流输运的电容敏感信息。</p></details> | 2026-06-12 | Sung Jin An et al. |
| 5 | **[Fast and Continuous Detection of Single Microwave Photons via Photo-assisted Quasiparticle Tunneling to a Superconducting Island](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.17470v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We demonstrate a single-photon detector operating in the microwave domain, based on photo-assisted quasiparticle tunneling events that poison a superconducting island. The detection relies on continuously monitoring the island's charge parity using microwave reflectometry. This scheme achieves 10\% detection efficiency with sub \SI{50}{\ns} time resolution and short dead time ($\sim \SI{1}{\us}$), for microwave photons at \SI{10}{\GHz}. The detector features three junctions connected to a superconducting island, which together carry out photoelectric conversion and charge readout. The enhanced light--matter coupling, crucial to photon to quasiparticle conversion, is provided by a granular aluminum-based high-impedance microwave resonator. The time resolved detection of itinerant microwave photon opens up new perspectives in quantum sensing, microwave quantum optics and mesoscopic physics.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们展示了一种在微波波段工作的单光子探测器，其基于光辅助准粒子隧穿事件毒化一个超导岛。该探测依赖于使用微波反射测量连续监测岛的电荷宇称。此方案对于10 GHz的微波光子实现了10%的探测效率，时间分辨率优于50纳秒，死时间短（约1微秒）。该探测器具有连接到超导岛的三个结，共同完成光电转换和电荷读出。增强的光-物质耦合（对光子到准粒子转换至关重要）由基于颗粒铝的高阻抗微波谐振器提供。行波微波光子的时间分辨探测为量子传感、微波量子光学和介观物理学开辟了新前景。</p></details> | 2026-06-12 | Julien Basset et al. |
| 6 | **[Interface-engineered oxidation-resistant wafer-level Tantalum-Tantalum thermocompression bonding for 3D integration of superconducting interconnects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14103v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Wafer-level 3D integration of superconducting interconnects requires low-thermal budget bonding processes compatible with superconducting materials. Rapid native oxide formation on tantalum (Ta) surfaces limits low-temperature, low-pressure direct Ta-Ta thermocompression bonding. In this study, we develop an oxidation-resistant bonding process using an ultrathin Au passivation layer to suppress oxide formation during bonding. The engineered interface enables blanket Ta-Ta wafer bonding at 300 $^\circ$C under 4.93 bar, significantly reducing the bonding thermal budget and generation of $α$-Ta across the interface, which potentially improves coherence time as reported in literature. Structural and interfacial analyses confirm oxide suppression and continuous metallic bonding, having a bond strength of 169 MPa. This work demonstrates a low-temperature, low-pressure Ta-Ta thermocompression bonding strategy for scalable 3D superconducting interconnect integration.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>晶圆级超导互连的三维集成需要与超导材料兼容的低热预算键合工艺。钽（Ta）表面快速形成的原生氧化物限制了低温低压直接Ta-Ta热压键合。本研究开发了一种抗氧化键合工艺，利用超薄金钝化层抑制键合过程中的氧化物形成。该工程化界面可在300°C、4.93 bar条件下实现整片Ta-Ta晶圆键合，显著降低了键合热预算及界面处α-Ta的生成，据文献报道这有助于延长相干时间。结构与界面分析证实了氧化物抑制效果及连续金属键合的形成，其键合强度达169 MPa。本工作展示了一种适用于可扩展三维超导互连集成的低温低压Ta-Ta热压键合策略。</p></details> | 2026-06-12 | Harsh Mishra et al. |
| 7 | **[Symmetry of the critical current function in superconducting nanodevices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14051v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We study a variety of nano-scale superconducting devices containing more than one weak link. Even in devices with multiple weak links the IB symmetry is usually obeyed, which means that if we reverse both the bias current direction and the magnetic field direction at the same time, the superconducting response, namely the critical current, remains unchanged. We also provide a detailed analysis of the situations in which such symmetry is violated.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了多种包含多个弱连接的纳米尺度超导器件。即使器件中存在多个弱连接，IB对称性通常仍被遵守，这意味着若同时反转偏置电流方向和磁场方向，超导响应（即临界电流）保持不变。我们还对违反该对称性的情形进行了详细分析。</p></details> | 2026-06-12 | Ziqi Zhao et al. |
| 8 | **[Observation of intertwined charge density wave order and superconductivity in Janus monolayer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.13828v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Low-dimensional transition-metal dichalcogenides (TMDCs) provide an ideal platform for studying the emergence of charge density wave (CDW) and superconductivity. The discovery of emergent CDW order in 1T $\mathrm{ZrTe_2}$ monolayer raises an important question: does this instability persist when one $\mathrm{Te}$ chalcogen layer is substituted by $\mathrm{Se}$? In the present work, we investigate the CDW (2$\times$2$\times$1) and superconducting instability in 1T $\mathrm{ZrSeTe}$ Janus monolayer using first-principles calculations. The phonon spectrum exhibits a pronounced anomaly at the $\mathrm{M}$ point of the irreducible Brillouin zone, arising from enhanced electron-phonon interaction together with electronic instabilities originating from both interband and intraband scattering. The resulting lattice distortion reconstructs the electronic structure, opening a small indirect band gap, driving the system from a semi-metallic to a semiconducting state. The energy gain associated with the distortion is significantly smaller than that of $\mathrm{ZrTe_2}$ monolayer, indicating that the replacement of one $\mathrm{Te}$ chalcogen layer with $\mathrm{Se}$ weakens the CDW instability. We have further investigated the effects of electronic correlation and biaxial strain, both acts as effective tuning parameters for the instabilities concerened. In the high temperature undistorted phase, $\mathrm{ZrSeTe}$ exhibits phonon mediated two-gap superconductivity. It originates primarily from the robust coupling between the soft phonon mode at $\mathrm{M}$ point and the electronic bands predominantly derived from $\mathrm{Zr}$ $\mathit{d}$ and $\mathrm{Te}$ $\mathit{p}$ orbitals crossing the Fermi level. Spin-orbit coupling (SOC) further modifies the electronic states and reduces the superconducting transition temperature.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>低维过渡金属硫族化合物（TMDCs）为研究电荷密度波（CDW）与超导电性的涌现提供了理想平台。1T相ZrTe₂单层中涌现CDW有序的发现引发了一个重要问题：当一层Te硫族原子层被Se取代时，这种不稳定性是否仍然存在？本文利用第一性原理计算研究了1T相ZrSeTe Janus单层中的CDW（2×2×1）与超导不稳定性。其声子谱在不可约布里渊区的M点呈现显著反常，源于增强的电子-声子相互作用以及由带间和带内散射共同引发的电子不稳定性。由此产生的晶格畸变重构了电子结构，打开了一个小的间接带隙，驱动体系从半金属态转变为半导体态。与ZrTe₂单层相比，该畸变对应的能量增益显著减小，表明用Se取代一层Te硫族原子层会削弱CDW不稳定性。我们进一步研究了电子关联和双轴应变的影响，两者均可作为所关注不稳定性的有效调控参数。在高温未畸变相中，ZrSeTe展现出声子介导的双能隙超导电性，其主要源于M点软声子模式与穿越费米能级的电子能带（主要来自Zr的d轨道和Te的p轨道）之间的强耦合。自旋轨道耦合（SOC）进一步调制了电子态并降低了超导转变温度。</p></details> | 2026-06-11 | Subhajit Pramanick et al. |
| 9 | **[Tantalum as a base material for superconducting integrated circuits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.13750v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The performance of superconducting integrated circuits for quantum applications is fundamentally limited by material-related losses. Tantalum, as an emerging material for next-generation quantum circuits, has attracted considerable attention in recent years after demonstrating breakthrough performance in both superconducting microwave resonators and qubits. Concurrently, a growing body of work is devoted to the operation of tantalum-based circuits and related fabrication techniques. This interest is further stimulated by tantalum thin films polymorphism resulting in a variety of its crystalline structure, superconducting properties, coherence, etc. Furthermore, tantalum circuits exhibit distinctive features in cryogenic experiments, which have not been observed in aluminum- or niobium-based ones. In this review, we summarize the recent research of tantalum thin films growth and phase selection mechanisms on various substrates, key aspects of fabrication and performance of superconducting circuit, including a material first-principles theoretical study. In conclusion, we address a number of open issues, including the role of \b{eta}-phase impurities, the effect of hydrofluoric acid solutions on chain characteristics, and the anomalous behavior of α-tantalum chains at cryogenic temperatures.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>用于量子应用的超导集成电路的性能从根本上受到材料相关损耗的限制。钽作为下一代量子电路的新兴材料，在超导微波谐振器和量子比特中展现出突破性性能后，近年来引起了广泛关注。与此同时，越来越多的工作致力于钽基电路的操作及相关制备工艺。钽薄膜的多晶型现象（导致其晶体结构、超导特性、相干性等多样化）进一步激发了这一研究兴趣。此外，钽基电路在低温实验中展现出铝基或铌基电路所未见的独特特征。本综述总结了钽薄膜在不同衬底上的生长与相选择机制、超导电路制备与性能的关键方面（包括材料的第一性原理理论研究）的最新进展。最后，我们探讨了若干未决问题，包括β相杂质的作用、氢氟酸溶液对链特性的影响，以及α-钽链在低温下的反常行为。</p></details> | 2026-06-11 | Evgeniy V. Zikiy et al. |
| 10 | **[Evidence for Clean d-wave Superconductivity in Samarium Nickelates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.20928v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The discovery of superconducting nickelates provides a unique opportunity to explore the pairing mechanism of high-temperature superconductivity. Here, we use ultrafast terahertz spectroscopy to probe the temperature-dependent superfluid density in an infinite-layer samarium nickelate film with a Tc of 20 K. The superfluid density decreases linearly with rising temperature, consistent with clean limit d-wave pairing. From this linear relation, we extract a superconducting gap of 2.5 meV and a gap-to-Tc ratio of 3, suggesting that this sample lies in the weak-coupling limit. Furthermore, the ratio of the mean free path to the coherence length, is determined to be 1.5, confirming the clean-limit behavior. These findings establish strong parallels between the pairing mechanisms in nickelate and cuprate superconductors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导镍酸盐的发现为探索高温超导的配对机制提供了独特机遇。本文利用超快太赫兹光谱技术，研究了临界温度Tc为20 K的无限层钐镍酸盐薄膜中超流密度随温度的变化关系。超流密度随温度升高呈线性下降，符合清洁极限d波配对特征。基于该线性关系，我们提取出超导能隙为2.5 meV，能隙与Tc之比为3，表明该样品处于弱耦合极限。此外，平均自由程与相干长度之比确定为1.5，证实了清洁极限行为。这些发现揭示了镍酸盐与铜酸盐超导体在配对机制上的高度相似性。</p></details> | 2026-06-11 | Qingming Huang et al. |
| 11 | **[QuBE/Qubex: an integrated hardware-software system for superconducting qubit experiments with broadband control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.13010v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Achieving high-fidelity operation in large-scale superconducting qubit systems requires not only control hardware with broad frequency coverage, low crosstalk, and tight synchronization but also software that coordinates system configuration, experiment execution, and data analysis. Here we present an integrated qubit-control system that combines broadband microwave hardware with a pulse-level software stack for scalable superconducting qubit experiments. The hardware provides broadband microwave coverage, including an instantaneous span of up to 1.6 GHz from a control output, while the software reduces setup and calibration overhead through automated configuration and built-in experiment workflows. We validate the system on a 64-qubit fixed-frequency transmon chip through full-chip frequency identification and representative demonstrations, including multi-unit far-detuned cross-resonance calibration and benchmarking that yields a measured two-qubit gate fidelity of 98.34%, and multilevel readout beyond the computational subspace. By disclosing the hardware architecture and releasing the software stack as open source, this work provides an inspectable hardware-software foundation for scalable superconducting qubit control experiments.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在大规模超导量子比特系统中实现高保真度操作，不仅需要具备宽频率覆盖、低串扰和严格同步的控制硬件，还需要能够协调系统配置、实验执行和数据分析的软件。本文提出一种集成化量子比特控制系统，将宽带微波硬件与脉冲级软件栈相结合，用于可扩展超导量子比特实验。该硬件提供宽带微波覆盖能力，单个控制输出瞬时带宽可达1.6 GHz；软件则通过自动化配置和内置实验工作流，降低系统搭建和校准开销。我们在64量子比特固定频率transmon芯片上，通过全芯片频率识别及代表性演示验证了该系统性能，包括多单元远失谐交叉共振校准与基准测试（测得两量子比特门保真度为98.34%），以及超出计算子空间的多能级读取。通过公开硬件架构并以开源方式发布软件栈，本工作为可扩展超导量子比特控制实验提供了可检验的软硬件基础。</p></details> | 2026-06-11 | Akinori Machino et al. |
| 12 | **[Interlayer Five-Spin Polaron in Superconducting Bilayer Nickelates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02891v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The discovery of high-$T_c$ superconductivity in Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates has sparked substantial effort towards understanding unconventional electronic states beyond a traditional cuprate-like $d^9$ configurational ground state. An understanding of the interplay between magnetic ground states and multi-orbital physics is key for establishing a microscopic mechanism for superconductivity. In the bilayer nickelates, spin density wave (SDW) order is a prominent feature in the non-superconducting regime, yet its relation to superconducting pairing remains an open question. Here, we use resonant x-ray scattering to examine the existence of SDW order in superconducting bilayer nickelate thin films La$_2$PrNi$_2$O$_7$ (LPNO). Comparing superconducting and oxygen-deficient LPNO thin films, we find that superconductivity occurs in SDW-free, oxygen-stoichiometric regions, whereas oxygen-deficiency promotes SDW order, indicating phase segregation of SDW and superconductivity. Furthermore, Ni-$L_3$ and O-$K$ edge spectroscopy reveals distinct electronic structures - particularly along the $c$-axis - between the two regions. Our results identify oxygen stoichiometry as a key parameter controlling interlayer coupling and thus the electronic structure of bilayer nickelates. In concert with theory, we propose that a ligand hole primarily resides at the inter-bilayer apical oxygen, forming a robust interlayer five-spin polaron state, which serves as the ground state for superconducting bilayer nickelates.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐中高温超导性的发现，促使学界投入大量精力去理解超越传统类铜酸盐d^9构型基态的非传统电子态。理解磁基态与多轨道物理之间的相互作用，是建立超导微观机制的关键。在双层镍酸盐中，自旋密度波序是非超导区域的一个显著特征，但其与超导配对的关系仍悬而未决。本文利用共振X射线散射技术，研究超导双层镍酸盐薄膜La₂PrNi₂O₇中自旋密度波序的存在性。通过对比超导与缺氧LPNO薄膜，我们发现超导性出现在无自旋密度波、氧化学计量比正常的区域，而缺氧则促进自旋密度波序，表明自旋密度波与超导性存在相分离。此外，Ni-L₃边和O-K边光谱揭示了两区域间（尤其是沿c轴方向）迥异的电子结构。我们的结果确认氧化学计量比是控制层间耦合、进而影响双层镍酸盐电子结构的关键参数。结合理论分析，我们提出配体空穴主要定域于双层间顶角氧原子上，形成稳定的层间五自旋极化子态，该态作为超导双层镍酸盐的基态。</p></details> | 2026-06-11 | Jiarui Li et al. |
| 13 | **[Revealing nonvolatile behaviors in magneto-thermal switching using microstructure-controlled superconducting composites](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.12778v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Thermal conductivity in a conductor changes by the application of an external magnetic field, which functions as a magneto-thermal switch. For superconductors, a large magneto-thermal switching can occur through a superconducting-to-normal conducting phase transition due to the change in the electron contribution in thermal conductivity. Arima et al. recently reported a nonvolatile nature of the magneto-thermal switching for superconducting solders, which consist of phase-separated Sn and Pb domains. Although they clarified that magnetic flux trapping is required to induce the nonvolatile magneto-thermal switching, a rule for such material design is still unclear. Here, we investigate the microstructure dependence of magneto-thermal switching in superconducting Sn/Pb multilayered composites, which are created by an accumulative roll bonding method. The thickness of each layer, that is the scale of microstructure, can be systematically controlled by the repetition number of roll bonding while the whole sample size and average composition are unchanged. We find that, as the formation of micro-scaled Sn domains proceeds by increasing the repetition number, a nonvolatility in the magneto-thermal conductivity gradually appears in correlation with the remanent magnetization. This study directly confirms that the inclusions with a size comparable to or less than the magnetic vortex in superconducting matrix is essential for magnetic flux trapping, enabling the nonvolatile magneto-thermal switching in superconducting composites.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>导体的热导率会因外加磁场而改变，这使其可作为磁热开关。对于超导体，由于热导率中电子贡献部分的变化，超导-正常导电相变可产生显著的磁热开关效应。Arima等人近期报道了由相分离的Sn和Pb区域构成的超导焊料中磁热开关的非易失性特性。尽管他们阐明磁通钉扎是诱导非易失性磁热开关的必要条件，但此类材料的设计规律仍不明确。本文研究了通过累积叠轧焊法制备的超导Sn/Pb多层复合材料的微观结构对磁热开关效应的影响。在保持样品整体尺寸和平均成分不变的情况下，通过改变轧制重复次数可系统调控各层厚度（即微观结构尺度）。我们发现，随着轧制次数增加导致微米级Sn区域逐渐形成，磁热导率的非易失性逐渐显现，并与剩余磁化强度相关。本研究直接证实：在超导基体中引入尺寸与磁通涡旋相当或更小的夹杂物，是实现磁通钉扎的关键，从而在超导复合材料中实现非易失性磁热开关。</p></details> | 2026-06-11 | Keigo Ito et al. |
| 14 | **[The Pound-Drever-Hall Method for Superconducting-Qubit Readout](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.03138v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Scaling quantum computers to large sizes requires the implementation of many parallel qubit readouts. Here we present an ultrastable superconducting-qubit readout method using the multi-tone self-phase-referenced Pound-Drever-Hall (PDH) technique, originally developed for use with optical cavities. In this work, we benchmark PDH readout of a single transmon qubit, using room-temperature heterodyne detection of all tones to reconstruct the PDH signal. We demonstrate that PDH qubit readout is insensitive to microwave phase drift, displaying $0.73^\circ$ phase stability over 2 hours, and capable of single-shot readout in the presence of phase errors exceeding the phase shift induced by the qubit state. We show that the PDH sideband tones do not cause unwanted measurement-induced state transitions for a transmon qubit, leading to a potential signal enhancement of at least $14$~dB.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>量子计算机的规模化扩展需要实现大量并行量子比特读取。本文提出一种基于多音自相位参考Pound-Drever-Hall技术的超稳定超导量子比特读取方法，该技术最初为光学腔设计。在本工作中，我们利用室温外差探测所有音调来重建PDH信号，对单个transmon量子比特的PDH读取进行了基准测试。我们证明PDH量子比特读取对微波相位漂移不敏感，在2小时内展现出0.73°的相位稳定性，并且能够在相位误差超过量子比特状态所引起相移的情况下实现单发读取。研究表明，PDH边带音调不会导致transmon量子比特产生非预期的测量诱导态跃迁，可实现至少14 dB的潜在信号增强。</p></details> | 2026-06-10 | Ibukunoluwa Adisa et al. |
| 15 | **[Multiband Superconductivity and Charge Density Wave in HfxZr1-xTe3 single crystals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.12598v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We report on the bulk multiband superconductivity and charge density wave (CDW) in HfxZr1-xTe3 single crystals. The parent compound ZrTe3 is a layered van der Waals material that undergoes a CDW transition near 63 K and exhibits only filamentary superconductivity below 2.0 K. Upon the introduction of a small amount of Hf (x = 0.02), the CDW transition temperature is reduced to TCDW ~ 53 K, while a robust bulk superconducting state emerges at Tc ~ 3.3 K, underscoring a subtle competition between CDW order and superconductivity in this quasi-one-dimensional system. Electrical resistivity, magnetic susceptibility, Hall effect, Seebeck coefficient, and specific heat measurements consistently confirm the bulk nature of the superconducting phase. The temperature dependence of the upper critical field Hc2(T) deviates markedly from single-band behavior, and it is well described by a two-band model, consistent with multiband superconductivity. Analysis of the Hall effect, and thermoelectric behavior reveal pronounced electronic anisotropy, with enhanced effective carrier masses, indicating that the subtle structural modification introduced by Hf substitutions affects the Fermi surface topology, as well as electronic correlations. Measurements of electrical resistivity in hydrostatic pressures up to ~ 2 GPa reveal that pressure drives TCDW to higher temperatures while suppressing Tc. These findings show that Hf doping can be used to fine-tune the balance between the CDW instability and superconductivity, possibly by means of chemical pressure effects, stabilizing a multiband superconducting state in Hf-doped ZrTe3.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们报道了HfxZr1-xTe3单晶中的体态多带超导电性与电荷密度波（CDW）。母体化合物ZrTe3是一种层状范德瓦尔斯材料，在63 K附近经历CDW相变，并在2.0 K以下仅表现出丝状超导电性。当引入少量Hf（x = 0.02）时，CDW相变温度降低至TCDW ~ 53 K，同时在Tc ~ 3.3 K处出现稳健的体态超导态，凸显了该准一维体系中CDW序与超导电性之间的微妙竞争。电阻率、磁化率、霍尔效应、塞贝克系数和比热测量一致证实了超导相的体态性质。上临界场Hc2(T)的温度依赖关系显著偏离单带行为，并可由双带模型很好地描述，这与多带超导电性相符。霍尔效应和热电行为的分析揭示了显著的电子各向异性，并伴有有效载流子质量的增强，表明Hf替代引入的细微结构修饰影响了费米面拓扑结构及电子关联。在高达约2 GPa的静水压下的电阻率测量显示，压力使TCDW向更高温度移动，同时抑制了Tc。这些发现表明，Hf掺杂可通过化学压力效应精细调控CDW不稳定性与超导电性之间的平衡，从而在Hf掺杂ZrTe3中稳定多带超导态。</p></details> | 2026-06-10 | F. F. G. Nogueira et al. |
| 16 | **[Superconductivity in the pressure-amorphized topological insulator CrP$_4$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.12241v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The interplay among superconductivity, magnetism, and nontrivial band topology represents one of the most compelling frontiers in condensed matter physics. The exploration of novel superconductivity in 3d transition-metal compounds, particularly the rare Cr-based systems containing strongly magnetic Cr ions, has long attracted attention owing to their unconventional pairing mechanisms that challenge conventional wisdom. Yet, Cr-based superconductors remain scarce, especially those possessing nontrivial topological character, underscoring the urgent need to uncover new members. Here we report the observation of superconductivity in pressure-amorphized Cr-based topological insulator CrP$_4$. Upon compression, CrP$_4$ undergoes an anomalous quantum phase transition from a metallic to a semiconducting-like state at around 15 GPa, driven by significant changes in the electronic structure. At approximately 70 GPa, re-metallization with superconductivity occurs alongside an irreversible amorphization. The superconducting transition temperature Tc increases monotonically with pressure, reaching 4.8 K at 141.3 GPa. Furthermore, theoretical calculations predict multiple topological phase transitions from a strong topological insulator to a trivial state and finally back to a strong topological state under pressure. Our study not only establishes CrP$_4$ as the first Cr-based amorphous superconductor but also opens a new paradigm for exploring superconducting and topological properties in amorphous materials.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导、磁性与非平庸能带拓扑之间的相互作用是凝聚态物理学中最引人注目的前沿领域之一。在3d过渡金属化合物中探索新型超导电性，特别是含有强磁性Cr离子的稀有铬基体系，因其挑战传统认知的非传统配对机制而长期备受关注。然而，铬基超导体仍然稀少，尤其是那些具有非平庸拓扑特性的材料，这凸显了发现新成员的迫切需求。在此，我们报道在压力非晶化的铬基拓扑绝缘体CrP₄中观测到超导电性。在压缩过程中，CrP₄在约15 GPa处经历一次由电子结构显著变化驱动的反常量子相变，从金属态转变为类半导体态。在约70 GPa处，伴随着不可逆的非晶化，发生了再金属化并出现超导电性。超导转变温度Tc随压力单调增加，在141.3 GPa时达到4.8 K。此外，理论计算预测在压力下存在多次拓扑相变，从强拓扑绝缘体转变为平庸态，最终回到强拓扑态。我们的研究不仅确立了CrP₄作为首个铬基非晶超导体，也为探索非晶材料中的超导和拓扑特性开辟了新的范式。</p></details> | 2026-06-10 | Chutong Zhang et al. |
| 17 | **[Superconductivity Near a Quantum Critical Point: Bounds on the Transition Temperature in the $γ$-Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.20009v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Near a quantum critical point (QCP) in a metal, strong Fermion-Fermion interactions mediated by soft collective bosons give rise to two competing phenomena: non-Fermi liquid behavior and superconductivity that deviates from conventional BCS and Migdal-Eliashberg theories. We consider the problem of obtaining closed-form analytical lower and upper bounds on transition temperatures for such systems. We focus mainly on a class of models known as the gamma-model, a variation of the Eliashberg theory of superconductivity where the effective interaction potential scales as V(Omega) proportional to 1/|Omega|^gamma. Building on a recent reformulation of Migdal-Eliashberg theory expressed as a classical infinite spin chain with nonlocal interactions [1,2], and employing a linear algebra analysis of the Hessian matrix obtained from the free energy functional, we derive rigorous, closed-form expressions for upper and lower bounds on the superconducting transition temperature for any gamma > 0. The main result of the paper is to establish an analytical upper bound on the transition temperature in closed form. Our upper bound is significantly tighter than those currently available in the literature and demonstrates rapid convergence toward results from prior numerical studies. Also, by applying the singularity condition directly to the unbounded Hessian matrix, our independently performed calculations confirm the lower bounds previously established in the literature [3].</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在金属中的量子临界点（QCP）附近，由软集体玻色子介导的强费米子-费米子相互作用会产生两种相互竞争的现象：非费米液体行为以及偏离传统BCS和Migdal-Eliashberg理论的超导电性。我们考虑为这类系统获得转变温度的闭合解析形式上下界的问题。我们主要关注一类称为伽马模型的模型，这是Eliashberg超导理论的一个变体，其中有效相互作用势按V(Ω) ∝ 1/|Ω|^γ标度。基于最近将Migdal-Eliashberg理论重新表述为具有非局域相互作用的经典无穷自旋链[1,2]，并利用从自由能泛函获得的Hessian矩阵的线性代数分析，我们推导出对于任何γ > 0，超导转变温度上下界的严格闭合形式表达式。本文的主要结果是建立了一个闭合形式的转变温度解析上界。我们的上界比文献中现有的上界显著更紧，并显示出快速收敛于先前数值研究的结果。此外，通过直接将奇异性条件应用于无界Hessian矩阵，我们独立进行的计算证实了文献</p></details> | 2026-06-10 | Ahmed Elezaby et al. |
| 18 | **[Proximity-induced unconventional superconductivity and chiral topological phases in twisted graphene/NbSe$_2$ van der Waals heterostructure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.12104v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We study proximity-induced unconventional superconductivity in a twisted graphene/NbSe$_2$ van der Waals heterostructure using the Bogoliubov-de Gennes formalism. The normal-state parameters of proximitized graphene are extracted from ab initio calculations at a twist angle of $23.4^\circ$, which reduces the common symmetry of the heterostructure to $\mathbf{C}_3$. We construct symmetry-allowed superconducting gap functions of the graphene layer according to the irreducible representations of the $\mathbf{C}_3$ group, containing singlet and triplet pairing channels and their mixtures. Computing the topological invariants as a function of the mixing parameters, we find a rich phase diagram of chiral topological superconducting phases, characterized by nonzero Chern numbers $C\in\{-4,-2,2,4\}$. While the nature of the superconducting order parameter of NbSe$_2$ remains debated, the formation of the van der Waals heterostructure and the related symmetry reduction can alter the relative stability of competing pairing channels, potentially stabilizing a chiral component that is proximity-induced into graphene and triggers the topological phases identified here, making the twisted graphene/NbSe$_2$ heterostructure a promising platform for chiral topological superconductivity detectable via quasiparticle interference imaging and transport measurements.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们利用Bogoliubov-de Gennes形式体系研究扭曲石墨烯/NbSe₂范德华异质结中的近邻诱导非传统超导电性。近邻化石墨烯的正常态参数从扭转角为23.4°的ab initio计算中提取，该扭转角将异质结的公共对称性降低至C₃。我们根据C₃群的不可约表示构建了石墨烯层的对称性允许的超导能隙函数，包含单重态和三重态配对通道及其混合。通过计算拓扑不变量作为混合参数的函数，我们发现了一个丰富的手性拓扑超导相图，其特征为非零陈数C∈{-4,-2,2,4}。尽管NbSe₂超导序参量的性质仍有争议，但范德华异质结的形成以及相关的对称性降低可以改变竞争配对通道的相对稳定性，可能稳定一个近邻诱导进入石墨烯的手性分量，并触发本文所识别的拓扑相，这使得扭曲石墨烯/NbSe₂异质结成为一个有前景的手性拓扑超导平台，可通过准粒子干涉成像和输运测量进行探测。</p></details> | 2026-06-10 | Adam Hložný et al. |
| 19 | **[Improvement of Heat-Treated Niobium Surface by In-situ Plasma Treatment Applied to Superconducting RF Resonator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.12091v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>A specific heat treatment at 300 C, named medium-temperature baking (Mid-T baking) is applied to superconducting radio-frequency (SRF) accelerating cavities to improve the quality factor (Qo) at medium accelerating fields (10 to 20 MV/m). This treatment is very successful when done properly as it can reduce by almost a factor of two the power dissipations in this field range. However, surface contamination can lead to the degradation of Qo instead. Plasma-based surface treatment provides an effective approach to eliminate contaminants from the Niobium surface. In this study an insitu plasma cleaning process with argon containing 10 % O2 was performed to remove hydrocarbons from Niobium surface. The treatment was applied before and after a heat treatment at 500 C under ultra-high vacuum conditions (Mid-T baking). Changes in chemical speciation and oxide layer alteration induced by plasma processing were analyzed using insitu X-ray photoelectron spectroscopy (XPS) and exsitu scanning electron microscopy (SEM). The results show that plasma treatment modifies the composition of Niobium oxides, converting a Nb2O5 layer into NbO2. Furthermore, a plasma treatment before Mid-T baking helps reduce unstable oxides such as NbxO and significantly increases the proportion of metallic Niobium at the surface. The Niobium sample treated by plasma prior to Mid-T baking showed a 53 % reduction in carbide formation. Moreover, the C1s component attributed to NbC bonds shifts toward lower binding energy, indicating the formation of a more metallic NbC phase. Whereas without plasma treatment, the higher binding energy component observed after Mid T baking is consistent with Nb2C.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>对超导射频（SRF）加速腔施加一种名为中温烘烤（Mid-T baking）的300°C特定热处理，以提高中等加速场（10至20 MV/m）下的品质因数（Q₀）。当操作得当时，这种处理非常成功，可以在该场范围内将功率耗散减少近一半。然而，表面污染反而会导致Q₀的退化。基于等离子体的表面处理为去除铌表面的污染物提供了一种有效方法。在本研究中，采用含有10% O₂的氩气进行原位等离子体清洁处理，以去除铌表面的碳氢化合物。该处理在超高真空条件下500°C热处理（中温烘烤）前后分别进行。利用原位X射线光电子能谱（XPS）和非原位扫描电子显微镜（SEM）分析了等离子体处理引起的化学形态变化和氧化层改变。结果表明，等离子体处理改变了铌氧化物的组成，将Nb₂O₅层转化为NbO₂。此外，在中温烘烤前进行等离子体处理有助于减少不稳定的氧化物（如NbₓO），并显著增加表面金属态铌的比例。在中温烘烤前经过等离子体处理的铌样品，其碳化物形成减少了53%。而且，归属于NbC键的C1s组分向更低结合能移动，表明形成了更具金属性的NbC相。相比之下，未经等离子体处理的样品，在中温烘烤后观察到的更高结合能组分则与Nb₂C一致。</p></details> | 2026-06-10 | C. Boutelaa et al. |

### spin glass

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | **[Landscape-Similarity-Guided Optimization in Divide-and-Conquer QAOA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.21689v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Divide-and-conquer strategies mitigate hardware constraints for the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) on Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) devices by partitioning large interaction graphs into smaller, hardware-compatible sub-problems. However, this approach introduces a severe classical training bottleneck: a decomposition across $m$ boundary nodes generates $2^m$ distinct sub-problems that typically require independent optimization. In this work, we demonstrate that across diverse synthetic and real-world interaction graphs, the variational landscapes of these reduced QAOA instances actually exhibit a robust universality. Adapting the replica-overlap framework of spin-glass physics, we define a landscape-overlap order parameter $q$ to quantify geometric correlations between energy landscapes, revealing a sharp landscape-similarity transition as graph connectivity is tuned. Exploiting this, we introduce Doubly Optimized QAOA (DO-QAOA), an adaptive pipeline that collapses the sub-problems from $2^m$ distinct sub-problems into $K=\mathcal{O}(1)$ effective landscape classes. By performing optimization on a single representative sub-problem and dynamically transferring parameters to remaining sub-problems, DO-QAOA lowers runtime and quantum measurement overhead by orders of magnitude while maintaining a competitive Approximation Ratio Gap (ARG).</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>分治策略通过将大型相互作用图划分为更小、与硬件兼容的子问题，缓解了含噪中等规模量子（NISQ）设备上量子近似优化算法（QAOA）的硬件限制。然而，这种方法引入了严重的经典训练瓶颈：跨越 $m$ 个边界节点的分解会产生 $2^m$ 个不同的子问题，这些子问题通常需要独立优化。在本工作中，我们证明，在各种合成和真实世界的相互作用图中，这些简化后的QAOA实例的变分景观实际上展现出鲁棒的普适性。通过借鉴自旋玻璃物理中的副本重叠框架，我们定义了一个景观重叠序参量 $q$ 来量化能量景观之间的几何相关性，并揭示了随着图连通性的调节而出现的尖锐景观相似性转变。利用这一点，我们提出了双重优化QAOA（DO-QAOA），这是一种自适应流程，将子问题从 $2^m$ 个不同的子问题压缩为 $K=\mathcal{O}(1)$ 个有效的景观类别。通过在一个代表性子问题上执行优化并将参数动态迁移至其余子问题，DO-QAOA将运行时间和量子测量开销降低了数个数量级，同时保持了有竞争力的近似比差距（ARG）。</p></details> | 2026-06-12 | Sokea Sang et al. |
| 2 | **[Molecular Beam Epitaxy of Mn2In2Se5 van der Waals Layers Using Mn Intercalation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.13906v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The weak van der Waals (vdW) force in layered chalcogenide materials has enabled the growth of ternary chalcogenide layers using unconventional approaches. Here, we report the molecular beam epitaxy (MBE) growth of Mn2In2Se5, a spin glass material with high level of magnetic frustration, through the heterointegration of MnSe on In2Se3. Directly depositing α-MnSe on the vdW In2Se3 layers results in Mn intercalation, transforming the In2Se3 layer into Mn2In2Se5. Large growth windows, including substrate temperatures from 250-450 °C and Se:Mn flux ratio of 1.1-3.1, have been identified for the intercalation process. With an optimized MnSe deposition time, smooth, single-crystalline, and (0001)-oriented Mn2In2Se5 layers with a root-mean-square (RMS) roughness of 1.5 nm can be synthesized. Further extending the MnSe deposition time results in the growth of uniform rock-salt structured α-MnSe (111) layers with a thickness of up to 8 nm and a narrow full-width-at-half-maximum (FWHM) of 0.35° in MnSe (222) XRD rocking curves. This report presents a unique approach for the growths of uniform and single-crystalline Mn2In2Se5 vdW layers using MBE, and potentially opens a pathway for synthesis of ternary vdW chalcogenides by intercalation of new atomic species in binary vdW chalcogenides.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>层状硫族化物材料中微弱的范德华（vdW）力使得利用非常规方法生长三元硫族化物层成为可能。在此，我们报道了通过将MnSe异质集成到In₂Se₃上，生长具有高度磁阻挫的自旋玻璃材料Mn₂In₂Se₅的分子束外延（MBE）过程。将α-MnSe直接沉积在vdW In₂Se₃层上会导致Mn插层，从而将In₂Se₃层转变为Mn₂In₂Se₅。对于该插层过程，我们确定了较大的生长窗口，包括250-450 °C的衬底温度和1.1-3.1的Se:Mn束流比。通过优化MnSe沉积时间，可以合成出光滑、单晶且(0001)取向的Mn₂In₂Se₅层，其均方根（RMS）粗糙度为1.5 nm。进一步延长MnSe沉积时间，则生长出均匀的岩盐结构α-MnSe (111)层，厚度可达8 nm，且MnSe (222) XRD摇摆曲线的半高宽（FWHM）窄至0.35°。本报告提出了一种利用MBE生长均匀且单晶的Mn₂In₂Se₅ vdW层的独特方法，并可能为通过在二元vdW硫族化物中插层新原子物种来合成三元vdW硫族化物开辟一条途径。</p></details> | 2026-06-11 | Qihua Zhang et al. |
| 3 | **[Cluster moves with an entropic reservoir accelerate low-temperature simulations of three-dimensional spin glasses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25872v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We present an algorithm for the simulation of three-dimensional spin glasses deep in the low-temperature phase: Parallel Tempering enhanced with Houdayer moves and with an entropic reservoir (PTHR). Although differences with the standard Houdayer algorithm are small, PTHR allows us to equilibrate a large number of samples of $L=16$ lattices with Gaussian couplings for temperatures $T\geq 0.2$. We show that the computational complexity displays better size scaling than standard Parallel Tempering. For finite sizes, our method outperforms other cluster algorithms by a speedup factor of around 64. In close analogy with standard Parallel Tempering, PTHR's computational complexity strongly relates to temperature chaos.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们提出一种用于在低温相深处模拟三维自旋玻璃的算法：结合Houdayer移动和熵库的并行回火算法（PTHR）。尽管与标准Houdayer算法存在微小差异，PTHR使我们能够对大量具有高斯耦合的 $L=16$ 晶格样本在温度 $T\geq 0.2$ 下进行平衡。我们证明，其计算复杂度在尺寸缩放方面优于标准并行回火。对于有限尺寸，我们的方法通过约64倍的加速因子优于其他簇算法。与标准并行回火密切类似，PTHR的计算复杂度与温度混沌现象密切相关。</p></details> | 2026-06-11 | Claudio Chilin et al. |
| 4 | **[Fibonacci Steady-States and Persistent Oscillations in an Ordered Multimode Dicke Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.13072v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Ultracold atoms in multimode optical cavities provide a rich testbed for many-body phenomena enabled by light-mediated interactions. Recent experiments include realizations of spin glasses and associative memories, as described by multimode Dicke models with disordered couplings. However, the properties of multimode Dicke models with ordered coupling geometries remain largely unexplored. In this work, we investigate the stable steady-states of the multimode Dicke model with an ordered nearest-neighbor coupling geometry, where $n_c$ atomic clusters are coupled via $n_c-1$ cavity modes. We show that the number of mean-field stable steady-states in the superradiant phase exhibits Fibonacci scaling with the number of atomic clusters, and that a subset of these steady-states exhibit persistent oscillations. Using both the truncated Wigner approximation and the numerically-exact hierarchy of pure states, we further demonstrate that these features of the stable steady-state solutions persist for finite cluster sizes. Ordered multimode Dicke models, such as the nearest-neighbor coupling geometry considered here, are accessible with current experimental technologies and point toward a broader class of strongly interacting dissipative systems with similarly rich behavior.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>多模光学腔中的超冷原子为光介导相互作用下的多体现象提供了丰富的实验平台。近期实验已实现自旋玻璃与联想记忆，这些现象由具有无序耦合的多模Dicke模型描述。然而，具有有序耦合几何结构的多模Dicke模型的性质尚未得到充分探索。本研究探究了具有有序最近邻耦合几何结构的多模Dicke模型的稳定稳态，其中$n_c$个原子团簇通过$n_c-1$个腔模耦合。我们证明，在超辐射相中，平均场稳定稳态的数量随原子团簇数呈斐波那契标度关系，且其中一部分稳态表现出持续振荡。通过截断维格纳近似与数值精确的纯态层级方法，我们进一步证明这些稳定稳态解的特征在有限团簇尺寸下依然存在。有序多模Dicke模型（如本文考虑的最近邻耦合几何结构）可通过现有实验技术实现，并指向一类具有类似丰富行为的强相互作用耗散系统。</p></details> | 2026-06-11 | Miriam J. Leonhardt et al. |
| 5 | **[Large time effective kinetics $β$-functions for quantum (2 + p)-spin glass II: Effective vertex expansion, local potential approximation and symmetries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.11089v4)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>This paper aims to study the functional renormalization group for quantum $(2+p)$-spin dynamics of a $N$-vector $\textbf{x}\in \mathbb{R}^N$. By fixing the gauge symmetry in the construction of the FRG, that breaks the $O(N)$-symmetry and deriving the corresponding non-trivial Ward identity we can: In the first time coarse grain and focus on this study using a more attractive method such as the effective vertex expansion, and in the second time explore this model beyond the symmetry phase. We show finite scale singularities due to the disorder, interpreted as the signal in the perturbation theory. The unconventional renormalization group approach is based on coarse-graining over the eigenvalues of matrix-like disorder, viewed as an effective kinetic term, with an eigenvalue distribution following a deterministic law in the large $N$ limit. As an illustration, the case where $p=3$ is scrutinized.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>本文旨在研究$N$维向量$\textbf{x}\in \mathbb{R}^N$的量子$(2+p)$-自旋动力学中的泛函重整化群。通过固定FRG构造中破坏$O(N)$对称性的规范对称性并推导相应的非平凡Ward恒等式，我们能够：首先采用有效顶点展开等更具吸引力的方法进行粗粒化聚焦研究，其次在对称相之外探索该模型。我们展示了由无序导致的有限尺度奇异性，这被解释为微扰理论中的信号。这种非常规重整化群方法基于对矩阵型无序特征值（视为有效动能项）的粗粒化处理，其在大$N$极限下服从确定性规律的特征值分布。作为示例，我们详细分析了$p=3$的情形。</p></details> | 2026-06-11 | Bêm-Biéri Barthélémy Natta et al. |
| 6 | **[Quantum-Driven Neuromorphic Computing for Million-Qubit-Scale Workloads](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.12968v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We introduce Apollo, a 10000 node p-qubit neuromorphic processor fabricated in 16 nm mixed signal CMOS and operating fully at room temperature with a typical analog core power envelope of about 0.5 W. Its fundamental element, the p-qubit, is a bistable stochastic unit whose continuous time state fluctuations are driven by integrated quantum entropy units that inject true quantum derived randomness. This enables ultrafast stochastic transitions at low energy while preserving a classical state representation. Apollo combines these p-qubits with a high degree Hyperion 256 interconnect topology, allowing efficient embedding of dense Ising and QUBO problems with substantially reduced minor embedding overhead compared with sparse annealing platforms. We show that, through the Suzuki Trotter correspondence, the equilibrium statistics and annealing dynamics of the p-qubit network reproduce key properties of transverse field quantum annealing without cryogenic cooling, long lived coherence, or microwave control. Beyond device level validation, Apollo is evaluated on a three dimensional spin glass benchmark previously used to study quantum advantage in superconducting annealers. Across 300 disorder realizations, Apollo reaches substantially lower ground state energies than reported cryogenic quantum annealing hardware, while remaining distinct from classical simulated annealing and simulated quantum annealing. A 350 nm release candidate device experimentally validates the core p-qubit dynamics, thermodynamic sampling correctness, and continuous time annealing behavior. These results establish Apollo as a room temperature, industrially scalable platform for quantum driven energy based optimization, probabilistic inference, generative modeling, and hybrid classical quantum workflows.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们推出Apollo——一款采用16纳米混合信号CMOS工艺制造、包含10000个p量子比特的神经形态处理器，完全在室温下运行，典型模拟核心功耗约0.5瓦。其基本元件p量子比特是一种双稳态随机单元，其连续时间状态波动由集成量子熵单元驱动，注入真正的量子衍生随机性。这使得在保持经典状态表征的同时，能以低能耗实现超快随机跃迁。Apollo将这些p量子比特与高维度Hyperion 256互连拓扑相结合，与稀疏退火平台相比，可大幅降低嵌入密集Ising和QUBO问题时的次要嵌入开销。我们证明，通过Suzuki-Trotter对应，p量子比特网络的平衡统计与退火动力学再现了横向场量子退火的关键特性，而无需低温冷却、长寿命相干或微波控制。除器件级验证外，Apollo还在此前用于研究超导退火器量子优势的三维自旋玻璃基准上进行了评估。在300种无序实现中，Apollo达到的基态能量显著低于已报道的低温量子退火硬件，同时与经典模拟退火和模拟量子退火保持差异。一款350纳米候选器件通过实验验证了核心p量子比特动力学、热力学采样正确性及连续时间退火行为。这些结果确立了Apollo作为室温、工业可扩展平台的地位，适用于量子驱动能量优化、概率推理、生成建模及混合经典量子工作流。</p></details> | 2026-06-11 | Adams Ivanov et al. |
| 7 | **[Spin correlations, low-energy scales, and anisotropy scaling in kagome frustrated magnets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.12512v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Neutron scattering is central to identifying quantum states of magnetic materials. In the search for quantum spin liquids, broad spectral features of inelastic spectra have been cited as evidence for spinon excitations, but can also arise from magnon excitations excitations in the presence of quenched disorder and strong magnon interactions. We develop a new approach to this problem, based on the adiabatic continuity in the $XXZ$ Heisenberg model on geometrically frustrating (GF) lattices as a function of the model's anisotropy. Using this approach, we identify universal features and energies of finite-temperature spin correlators. Focusing on the kagome lattice, we show that the low-energy spin spectral function contains robust, momentum-independent peaks with frequencies: $ω_1 \approx 3.4 T^*$ and $ω_2 \approx 6.3 T^*$, where the ``hidden energy scale'' $T^*$ is the characteristic scale of a low-temperature peak in the heat capacity, at which many GF magnets also display spin-glass freezing. We show that the spectral features at low energies $ω\lesssim T^*$ arise from single-magnon scattering and identify the magnetizations of the respective excitations. We explore the evolution of the spectral features with temperature and discuss extensions to other GF lattices. Our results provide a sharp spectroscopic criterion for interpreting neutron scattering in kagome and other GF quantum magnets.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>中子散射是识别磁性材料量子态的核心手段。在量子自旋液体的探索中，非弹性散射谱的宽谱特征曾被引作自旋子激发的证据，但这些特征也可能源于存在淬灭无序和强磁振子相互作用时的磁振子激发。我们基于几何阻挫（GF）晶格上$XXZ$海森堡模型随各向异性变化的绝热连续性，发展了一种解决该问题的新方法。利用该方法，我们识别出有限温度自旋关联函数的普适特征与能量。聚焦于kagome晶格，我们证明低能自旋谱函数包含稳健的动量无关峰，其频率为$ω_1 \approx 3.4 T^*$和$ω_2 \approx 6.3 T^*$，其中“隐藏能标”$T^*$是热容低温峰的特征标度，许多GF磁体在该温度下也会出现自旋玻璃冻结。我们证明低能区$ω\lesssim T^*$的谱特征源于单磁振子散射，并识别了相应激发的磁化强度。我们探讨了谱特征随温度的演化，并讨论了向其他GF晶格的推广。我们的结果为解释kagome及其他GF量子磁体的中子散射提供了清晰的谱学判据。</p></details> | 2026-06-10 | Phillip Popp et al. |
| 8 | **[Frustration from Localized Zhang-Rice States: A Unified Theory of Doping-Driven Magnetic Transitions in Cuprates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18453v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The microscopic mechanism by which doped holes disrupt the antiferromagnetic order is one of the fundamental questions in cuprates. In this work, we propose a unified microscopic theory in which doped holes form spatially localized Zhang-Rice singlets which actively mediate emergent spin exchange. Rather than acting as simple non-magnetic vacancies, these localized states introduce emergent next-nearest $J_2$ and third-nearest $J_3$ neighbor superexchanges. This dopant-induced exchange pathway generates significant magnetic frustration, naturally explaining the rapid collapse of the Néel AFM order and the emergence of a spin-glass phase on the hole-doped side. Our findings provide a comprehensive framework for understanding the complex doping-driven magnetic phase transitions and magnetic electron-hole asymmetry in lightly doped cuprates.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>掺杂空穴破坏反铁磁序的微观机制是铜氧化物中的基本问题之一。在本工作中，我们提出了一种统一的微观理论，其中掺杂空穴形成空间局域的Zhang-Rice单态，这些单态主动介导涌现的自旋交换。这些局域态并非充当简单的非磁性空位，而是引入涌现的次近邻$J_2$和第三近邻$J_3$超交换作用。这种掺杂诱导的交换路径产生了显著的磁阻挫，自然解释了奈尔反铁磁序的快速坍塌以及空穴掺杂侧自旋玻璃相的出现。我们的发现为理解轻掺杂铜氧化物中掺杂驱动的复杂磁相变及磁电子-空穴不对称性提供了全面的理论框架。</p></details> | 2026-06-08 | Xiaodong Wang et al. |
| 9 | **[On the true low-energy excitations of the three-dimensional spin glass](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07197v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We study the low-energy excitations of the three dimensional spin glass through a large-scale Monte Carlo simulation on lattices up to $L=18$. We find smooth extrapolations down to zero temperature, which, in the case of the energy and of the link overlap, can be directly -- and favourably -- compared with previous investigations featuring ground states (i.e., at zero temperature). The best fit for the fractal dimension of the excitations is provided by Replica-Symmetry Breaking theory, but we also consider the alternative TNT description. The $P(q)$ is found to verify the Parisi-Toulouse temperature scaling. Our data provides a spectacular confirmation of the overlap-equivalence hypothesis.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们通过晶格尺寸高达 $L=18$ 的大规模蒙特卡罗模拟，研究了三维自旋玻璃的低能激发。我们发现向零温的平滑外推结果，在能量和链接重叠的情况下，能够直接且有利地与先前关注基态（即零温）的研究进行对比。激发分形维数的最佳拟合由副本对称性破缺理论提供，但我们也考虑了替代性的TNT描述。研究发现 $P(q)$ 满足Parisi-Toulouse温度标度关系。我们的数据为重叠等价假说提供了显著的证实。</p></details> | 2026-06-05 | Claudio Chilin et al. |
